name: Red Hot Spicy Buffalo Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the wings and discard the tips.
2. Deep fry the wings at 400 degrees for 12 minutes or until cooked; drain.
3. In a bowl, combine the Red Hot and melted butter.
4. Toss the wings in the sauce to coat.
5. Serve with vegetable sticks and dressing.
6. For equally crispy wings: Broil or grill the wings for 30 to 45 minutes, turning often, until cooked. Then toss in the Red Hot and butter.
Typed by Anne Marie & Tony Chiappetta.
